overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game. A character in a dark coat walks through a foggy, night-time forest trail, approaching and passing through a ritualistic area with standing figures holding lanterns, surrounded by circling birds. The atmosphere is ominous with thick fog and low visibility throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy forest trail with twisted trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dark forest path, holding a light source

entered.detail: large gnarled tree trunk with twisted branches silhouetted against the fog
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with scattered leaves
thick atmospheric fog obscuring distant visibility
dense shrubs and undergrowth lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, foggy forest trail at night. The character walks forward along a narrow dirt path flanked by twisted trees and dense undergrowth. The atmosphere is thick with fog, limiting visibility to the immediate surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: ritual clearing with standing figures and fire pits

events.description: exits dense forest into open ritual clearing with standing figures holding lanterns
flock of birds begins circling overhead in the fog

agents.ego_description: approaching the ritual site with caution, moving between the standing figures

notable_agents.action: standing motionless holding a lantern, facing the path
standing near a small fire pit, silhouetted against the flames

entered.detail: humanoid figure standing still holding a lantern or light source
small burning fire or torch providing orange light in the darkness
flock of birds flying in circles overhead

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a ritual clearing where motionless figures stand holding lanterns. The character walks between these figures as birds circle overhead. Small fires burn on the sides of the path, casting flickering orange light through the thick fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open foggy field beyond ritual site

events.description: passes the ritual figures and enters deeper fog with reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dense fog, leaving the ritual site behind

entered.detail: impenetrable wall of white-gray fog blocking distant view
patches of brown dead grass lining the trail

segments.scene_description: Having passed the ritual site, the character continues into an open field where the fog grows even thicker. The standing figures and their lights fade into the darkness behind as the path leads deeper into the misty void.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic forest trail that opens into a ritualistic clearing before dissolving into a featureless misty void. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path flanked by twisted trees, where dense night fog severely limits visibility. As the forest opens, the scene shifts into a ritual clearing where the character passes between motionless figures holding lanterns and small flickering fires that cast an orange glow through the haze. The camera then follows the character beyond the ritual site, leaving the lights and figures behind as the terrain expands into an open field. Finally, the environment fades into a thick, oppressive fog that swallows the path and plunges the surroundings into a deep, misty darkness.
